rows.label: qev025109_MSG0002
rows.name: Ah... Ahh...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025109_MSG0003
rows.name:
Yuyu-chan, who was so warm... Is now
as cold as a cooled-off pizza...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025109_JNK0010
rows.name: Call Out

rows.label: qev025109_SEL0011
rows.name: Call out to the devastated Aqual.

rows.label: qev025109_JNK0020
rows.name: Leave Him Be

rows.label: qev025109_SEL0021
rows.name: Leave Aqual alone for now.

rows.label: qev025109_MSG0004
rows.name: ...You're... always so... kind, ne...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025109_MSG0005
rows.name: But... I... I...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025109_MSG0007
rows.name:
I... made a promise with Yuyu-chan.
That next time, we'd try making the
pizza we love ourselves, ne.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025109_MSG0008
rows.name:
I even built an oven at home
for that... And we were going
to... practice together...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025109_MSG0009
rows.name: Guh...! And yet... why...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025109_MSG0010
rows.name:
...It's from the culprit.
Something is... written here...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025109_MSG0011
rows.name:
"Are you frustrated? Are you suffering? But
the flames of hatred will not extinguish
until everything is burned to ashes"...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025109_MSG0012
rows.name:
...The culprit is... someone who
knows me, ne. And that's why
they did this to Yuyu-chan...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025109_MSG0013
rows.name:
The next target is... surely me, ne.
This guy is trying to kill me, sa.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025109_MSG0015
rows.name:
...Try it if you can! I will
absolutely never forgive you...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025109_MSG0016
rows.name:
I'll turn it around...
catch you, and kill you...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025109_MSG0017
rows.name:
I have to return to NLA...
and... Find the culprit... I
have to avenge Yuyu-chan, ne.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025109_MSG0018
rows.name:
I... might have figured out who the
culprit is, ne. It all depends on
the forensics results, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025109_MSG0019
rows.name:
I absolutely won't let it end like this,
yo. The sin of taking Yuyu-chan's life...
I will absolutely make them pay![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025109_MSG0020
rows.name:
I'm returning to NLA, but if
anything happens to me, talk
to my colleague, Jim, yo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025109_MSG0021
rows.name:
I'm counting on you, I need
your cooperation, sa![ST:wait ]
